lorenzl5 Apps

Personal F-Droid repo serving all lorenzl5 Android apps (Share Router, ...). Built from the latest GitHub release of each app repository.

Currently it serves 1 apps. To add it to your F-Droid client, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this URL:

https://ilorenz00.github.io/fdroid-lorenzl5/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
74 53 E1 FB 81 1E 43 16 D8 FD AF 12 79 F5 FD FF F5 0A 2E 91 71 45 41 11 06 3A 26 5E 27 D3 56 68
